message:
refactor(pipeline,workflow): unify agent type normalization via Canonical()

Pipeline:
- Rewrite normalizeAgentType(), NormalizeAgentType(), and IsValidAgentType()
  to use agent.AgentType.Canonical() instead of the static AgentTypeAliases
  map, adding support for cursor, windsurf, aider, ollama and all their
  aliases (ws, openai-codex, codex-cli, google-gemini, etc.)
- Remove the AgentTypeAliases map entirely
- Update validation warning hint to list all supported agent types
- Tests cover extended aliases, whitespace trimming, and a new test that
  "ws" (windsurf alias) does not produce an unknown-agent warning

Workflow:
- Rewrite ProfileToAgentType() to use Canonical() instead of its own
  lowercase switch-case, gaining automatic support for new aliases
- Tests cover claude_code, openai-codex, google-gemini, ws, and
  whitespace-padded inputs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+func TestValidate_StepWithExtendedSupportedAgentDoesNotWarn(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
+
+	w := &Workflow{
+		SchemaVersion: "2.0",
+		Name:          "test",
+		Steps: []Step{
+			{
+				ID:     "s1",
+				Agent:  "ws",
+				Prompt: "test",
+			},
+		},
+	}
+
+	result := Validate(w)
+	for _, warning := range result.Warnings {
+		if strings.Contains(warning.Message, "unknown agent type") {
+			t.Fatalf("unexpected unknown agent warning for supported alias: %+v", warning)
+		}
+	}
+}
+
 func TestValidate_StepWithInvalidRoute(t *testing.T) {
 	t.Parallel()

@@ -7,6 +7,7 @@ import (
 	"strings"

@@ -125,15 +126,23 @@ func findPaneForStage(session, agentType, model string) (string, error) {
 }
 
 func normalizeAgentType(t string) string {
-	switch strings.ToLower(t) {
-	case "claude", "cc", "claude-code":
+	switch agent.AgentType(t).Canonical() {
+	case agent.AgentTypeClaudeCode:
 		return "cc"
-	case "codex", "cod", "openai":
+	case agent.AgentTypeCodex:
 		return "cod"
-	case "gemini", "gmi", "google":
+	case agent.AgentTypeGemini:
 		return "gmi"
+	case agent.AgentTypeCursor:
+		return "cursor"
+	case agent.AgentTypeWindsurf:
+		return "windsurf"
+	case agent.AgentTypeAider:
+		return "aider"
+	case agent.AgentTypeOllama:
+		return "ollama"
 	default:
-		return t
+		return strings.ToLower(strings.TrimSpace(t))
 	}
 }
